name: Dinohumon

signature_move.name: Lizard Dance
signature_move.description: Uses dance-like movements to cut the opponent with the blades on its arms andAkinakes.

description: A Dragon Man Digimon with the appearance of a humanoid lizard. It lives in an area that has not yet become a modernised civilisation, where all of the tribesmen are valiant combat dragons who possess the makings of a warrior. It has great muscle strength, allowing its to swing its greatsword, Akinakes , with ease. Its Special Move is doing dance-like movements and cutting the opponent with the blades on its arms and Akinakes ( Lizard Dance ).
